name: Cohere
description: Registers Cohere as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Cohere API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Cohere API key
settings.description: Cohere API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to COHERE_API_KEY.

providers.name: Cohere
providers.description: Refreshes Cohere chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
